name: BACARDÍ & Cola
description: A classic Bacardi rum and cola made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca and chilled cola over ice. Like many of the world's greatest pairings, a rum and cola is best if made with 'the original' BACARDÍ. BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum was designed to be the ultimate mixing spirit.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Blanca white rum, followed by chilled cola, and give it all a gentle stir.
Give it all a gentle stir.

Like many of the world's greatest pairings, a rum and cola is best if made with 'the original' BACARDÍ. Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Blanca white rum, followed by chilled cola, and give it all a gentle stir. Add the chilled cola. Give it all a gentle stir.
